author: Haroen Viaene
subject: feat(hooks): allow useHits and useInfiniteHit to be generic (algolia/react-instantsearch#3364)
body:
* feat(hooks): allow useHits and useInfiniteHit to be generic

This requires https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/pull/5019 and enables better generics for the Hits component (https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/pull/3363)

* Apply suggestions from code review

* Update useInfiniteHits.ts

* latest IS

* use BaseHit from IS
